intro: Vencore Design Co. is a Design & Build and Project Delivery firm delivering end-to-end interior fit-outs, turnkey execution, and built-space solutions across residential, commercial, and lifestyle environments.
leadershipIntro: Vencore Design Co. is led by Founders & Managing Directors Shri Venkatesh Kancha and Shri Venugopal Kancha, bringing together a design-led execution mindset with strong real estate and delivery experience.
coreTeamIntro: Supporting the Managing Directors is a multidisciplinary leadership team:

deliveryEcosystem.title: Design & Delivery Ecosystem
body: Vencore Design Co. operates within a strong ecosystem of award-winning design consultants, structural and MEP experts, LEED-accredited sustainability professionals, and premium international product partners.
This ensures every project is supported by global-quality materials, technically sound systems, and design-driven execution standards.

capabilityLanes.title: Design
capabilityLanes.text: Concept planning, layout optimization, visualizations, and buildable BOQs — aligned with what your site, budget, and timeline can actually deliver.

capabilityLanes.title: Execution
capabilityLanes.text: Civil, core-shell, MEP coordination, and fit-out management under senior site leadership with daily controls on quality and schedule.

capabilityLanes.title: Supply
capabilityLanes.text: Curated vendor bench, negotiated sourcing, logistics, and QC — materials arrive ready for installation, not fire-fighting on site.

capabilityLanes.title: Installation
capabilityLanes.text: Joinery, modular systems, finishes, lighting, and AV — installed, tested, snagged, and documented for a clean handover.

completedProjects.name: Retrofit Works for Sowjanya Dental Clinic
